creator: riggs@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Jan Beich from comment #2)


Regarding the ABI: yes, mass bump dependent ports would be needed, that's correct. Does this have to be part of the patch for the exp-run?

Regarding the opencv dependency change: My ports tree was at r438425 when I tested the build and made the patch. Without the change, poudriere testport did not survive the lib-depends stage. If this is no longer required, good!
